title: Massachusetts Department of Labor Standards (DLS) — Agency Landing Page
description: Scrape of the MA Department of Labor Standards landing page. DLS administers public- and private-sector workplace-safety programs, prevailing-wage schedules, and labor standards — including SafetyWorks consultation, the Workplace Safety and Health Program (WSHP), lead/asbestos/mine safety, and prevailing-wage requests. DLS is the state's primary state-plan-equivalent occupational-safety agency for public-sector workplaces where federal OSHA jurisdiction is limited.
notes: No filing deadline on this landing page. For public-sector worksites the DLS WSHP is the operative safety program (distinct from federal OSHA, see 10-osha). File ~5.3 KB.
